questions.question: What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "provided"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "scenario"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "outcome"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "assume"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "condition"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "if"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "unless"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "would"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "imagine"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "result"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "cause"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "happen"?
Choose the best word: _____ it rains, we will stay home.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "If it rains, we will stay home." — từ đúng là "if" (nếu).

questions.question: Choose the best word: I won't go _____ you come.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "I won't go unless you come." — từ đúng là "unless" (trừ khi).

questions.question: Choose the best word: I _____ travel if I were rich.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "I would travel if I were rich." — từ đúng là "would" (sẽ (giả định)).

questions.question: Choose the best word: _____ you won the lottery.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "Imagine you won the lottery." — từ đúng là "imagine" (tưởng tượng).

questions.question: Choose the best word: Hard work brings good _____s.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "Hard work brings good results." — từ đúng là "result" (kết quả).

questions.question: Choose the best word: Heat _____s ice to melt.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "Heat causes ice to melt." — từ đúng là "cause" (gây ra).

questions.question: Choose the best word: What would _____ if we left?
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "What would happen if we left?" — từ đúng là "happen" (xảy ra).

questions.question: Choose the best word: It is _____ to succeed.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "It is possible to succeed." — từ đúng là "possible" (có thể).

questions.question: Choose the best word: It seems _____ to win.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "It seems impossible to win." — từ đúng là "impossible" (không thể).

questions.question: Choose the best word: This is a _____ situation.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "This is a real situation." — từ đúng là "real" (thực tế).

questions.question: Choose the best word: That is an _____ scenario.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "That is an unreal scenario." — từ đúng là "unreal" (không thực).

questions.question: Choose the best word: This is a _____ question.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "This is a hypothetical question." — từ đúng là "hypothetical" (giả định).

questions.question: Complete the sentence: If you heat ice, it ___.
questions.explanation: Zero conditional: present simple in both clauses.

questions.question: Complete the sentence: If it rains, we ___ stay home.
questions.explanation: First conditional: will + base verb in result.

questions.question: Complete the sentence: If I ___ rich, I would travel a lot.
questions.explanation: Second conditional uses past simple in the if-clause.

questions.question: Complete the sentence: She would help if she ___ time.
Complete the sentence: Water boils if you ___ it to 100°C.
Complete the sentence: If you study, you ___ pass.
Complete the sentence: I ___ buy a car if I had money.
Complete the sentence: Unless you hurry, you ___ be late.
Complete the sentence: If he ___ harder, he would succeed.
Complete the sentence: If you press this button, the machine ___.
Which English word means "miễn là"?
Which English word means "kịch bản"?
Which English word means "kết quả"?
Which English word means "giả sử"?
Which English word means "điều kiện"?
Which English word means "nếu"?
